description_long: This is a modern, low-rise school complex featuring a series of interconnected rectangular buildings with flat green roofs and large glass windows. The main structure is L-shaped, with a prominent green roof and a series of wooden doors and windows along its facade. Several smaller structures, including a covered outdoor area, a parking lot with cars, and a small utility building, are distributed around the main building. The campus includes landscaped areas with trees and paved walkways connecting the different sections. There is a rooftop terrace visible on one of the buildings, suggesting recreational or gathering space. The overall design emphasizes open space, accessibility, and a contemporary architectural aesthetic.
description: A modern, low-rise school complex with flat green roofs, large glass windows, and interconnected rectangular buildings, surrounded by landscaped areas and outdoor facilities.
description_view_0: From this angle, the L-shaped main building with its expansive green roof is most prominent, along with adjacent smaller structures and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front entrance area, a covered outdoor pavilion, a parking lot, and a small utility building, with the main school building extending behind.
description_view_2: Here, the rooftop terrace and the full length of the main building are visible, as well as the arrangement of outdoor spaces and connecting walkways.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the rear of the complex, including the rooftop terrace, connecting corridors, and the relationship between the main building and auxiliary structures.
